title: IHGAMP: Pan-Cancer HRD Prediction From Routine H&E Whole-Slide Images Using Foundation Models.
publicationName: APMIS : acta pathologica, microbiologica, et immunologica Scandinavica
journalName: APMIS : acta pathologica, microbiologica, et immunologica Scandinavica
snippet: Homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) guides PARP inhibitor and platinum-based therapy selection but relies on costly next-generation sequencing with limited accessibility. Here, we show that IHGAMP, a computational framework using vision transformer foundation models, predicts HRD from routine H&E whole-slide images with AUROC 0.766 (95% CI 0.727-0.803...

title: Comprehensive Multi-Omics Characterization of CYP2R1 as a Diagnostic and Functional Biomarker in Hepatocellular Carcinoma.
snippet: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) remains a major cause of cancer mortality worldwide, yet reliable molecular biomarkers for early diagnosis and prognosis are limited. The cytochrome P450 (CYP) enzyme superfamily plays central roles in hepatic metabolism and tumor biology, but its global dysregulation in HCC has not been comprehensively defined.Here, we system...

title: Infection of 5xFAD mice with a mouse-adapted SARS-CoV-2 does not alter Alzheimer's disease neuropathology yet induces widespread changes in gene expression across diverse cell types.
publicationName: Alzheimer's & dementia : the journal of the Alzheimer's Association
journalName: Alzheimer's & dementia : the journal of the Alzheimer's Association
snippet: The COVID-19 pandemic underscored the impact of severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) infection on worsening the severity of Alzheimer's disease (AD) neuropathology and disease progression. Aged 5xFAD and wild-type (WT) mice were infected with a mouse-adapted SARS-CoV-2 (MA10), and extensive characterization of molecular and cellular....

title: Clinicopathologic Characterization of Muscle Biopsy Findings in Overlap Myositis: A Single Tertiary Care Center Experience.
snippet: This study aims to describe the muscle biopsy features of overlap myositis (OM) and compare them with other inflammatory myopathies. We analyzed clinical, serological findings, and histopathological patterns in muscle biopsies to understand the features of OM. Muscle biopsies submitted from patients diagnosed with OM between January 2023 and October 2024 at...
